title: Golemancy core original parity
ported_subsystems: authoritative byte upgrade slots with duplicate stacking
original material stats and derived attributes
functional original golem body, core, upgrade and decoration items
server/client synchronization of material, core, upgrades, decorations, colors, toggles and carried item
bell binding, colored markers and both dismantling modes
carried item, carried fluid and carried essentia separation
gather, fill, empty, sorting, harvest, lumber, guard, butcher, use, fishing, liquid and essentia core foundations
Use core marker selection and FakePlayer block/item interaction
original decoration attribute effects and dart launcher
original 128x128 body/accessory models and material textures
modern_adapters: SynchedEntityData replaces legacy data watcher fields
Forge FakePlayer replaces legacy FakePlayer interaction manager
modern loot and Forge break events replace 1.7.10 harvesting hooks
ModelPart and RenderLayer replace GL11 model passes
fluid and essentia storage use 1.19.2 block-entity adapters
known_runtime_checks: Use core interaction compatibility with third-party blocks/items
large marker networks and chunk unload/reload
visual alignment of accessories and carried items
liquid and essentia interoperability with external mods
